prompt_text:
### Demographics: 35-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 1 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
MASH
Body mass index category: Overweight
Major Depressive Disorder
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (mother)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~18.8 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 65.1 kg; Height 164.3 cm; BMI 24.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 131/83 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.3%; 9 months ago 8.0%; 6 months ago 7.5%; 3 months ago 7.0%; current 6.0%), FPG (12 months ago 193mg/dL; 9 months ago 171mg/dL; 6 months ago 157mg/dL; 3 months ago 183mg/dL; current 128mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 66.1kg; 9 months ago 64.2kg; 6 months ago 66.3kg; 3 months ago 64.1kg; current 65.1kg), Height (12 months ago 164.3cm; 9 months ago 164.3cm; 6 months ago 164.3cm; 3 months ago 164.3cm; current 164.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 132mmHg; 9 months ago 129mmHg; 6 months ago 128mmHg; 3 months ago 132mmHg; current 131mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 79mmHg; 9 months ago 81mmHg; 6 months ago 81mmHg; 3 months ago 81mmHg; current 83mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 85U/L; 9 months ago 90U/L; 6 months ago 82U/L; 3 months ago 82U/L; current 83U/L), AST (12 months ago 93U/L; 9 months ago 92U/L; 6 months ago 84U/L; 3 months ago 83U/L; current 85U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.6mg/dL; current 0.5mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 47mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 50mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 46mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 48mL/min/1.73m²; current 47mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 290mg/g; 9 months ago 295mg/g; 6 months ago 366mg/g; 3 months ago 262mg/g; current 276mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 92mg/dL; 9 months ago 98mg/dL; 6 months ago 92mg/dL; 3 months ago 98mg/dL; current 96mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 52mg/dL; 9 months ago 54mg/dL; 6 months ago 52mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 53mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 177mg/dL; 9 months ago 158mg/dL; 6 months ago 161mg/dL; 3 months ago 177mg/dL; current 169mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.2g/dL; 6 months ago 13.9g/dL; 3 months ago 14.0g/dL; current 13.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
